milestone: AGH-9 End-to-End Vertical Slice + Q1–Q10 Survey
scope: L1 → L3 → L4 → L5 full path under FixtureHarnessStore, with Q1–Q10 smoke survey inline.

survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q4: Layer 5 produced exactly 1 user-query action packet.
survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q5: Every Layer 4 packet is a PromotionGatePacketV1 / RegistryUpdateProposalV1 / EvaluationPacketV1 (proposal-only doctrine).
survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q6: ingest_queue and research_queue both drained to depth 0 after lifecycle.
survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q7: surface_action_queue carries the one L5 action we emitted (depth == 1).
survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q8: L5 UserQueryActionPacketV1 provenance_refs include a concrete packet reference (not only 'bundle:' stubs).
survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q9: guardrail_violations() scan over every persisted packet returns []. (word-bounded regex; 'recommendation'/'buying-pattern' allowed, 'recommend'/'buy' standalone not.)
survey_q1_q10_inline_asserts.Q10: Layer 4 honest-fallback proposal target_state ∈ {real_derived_with_degraded_challenger, template_fallback, insufficient_evidence}.

regression.full_suite: 911 passed, 1 failed (pre-existing test_phase39_hypothesis_family.py::test_phase39_orchestrator_writes_artifacts, unrelated to AGH v1 - see HANDOFF note).
